hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "^git commit|^git add"; then staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- ".claude/"); if [ -n "$staged" ]; then for f in $staged; do if git show ":$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -qE "/Users/|/home/"; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"$f contains user-specific paths (/Users/ or /home/). Remove them before committing.\"}"; exit 0; fi; done; fi; fi'
